mapper.insert: INSERT INTO message (sender_anonymous_id, receiver_anonymous_id, message_text, message_status, message_type) VALUES (#{senderAnonymousId}, #{receiverAnonymousId}, #{messageText}, #{messageStatus}, #{messageType})
mapper.select: SELECT m.id, m.sender_anonymous_id, m.receiver_anonymous_id, m.message_text, m.message_status, m.create_time, CASE WHEN m.sender_anonymous_id LIKE 'admin_%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_admin, m.message_type FROM message m LEFT JOIN user u ON m.sender_anonymous_id = u.anonymous_id WHERE ((m.sender_anonymous_id = #{anonymousId} AND m.receiver_anonymous_id = #{targetAnonymousId}) OR (m.sender_anonymous_id = #{targetAnonymousId} AND m.receiver_anonymous_id = #{anonymousId})) AND m.message_status = 1 ORDER BY m.create_time ASC, m.id ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT m.id, m.sender_anonymous_id, m.receiver_anonymous_id, m.message_text, m.message_status, m.create_time, CASE WHEN m.sender_anonymous_id LIKE 'admin_%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_admin, m.message_type, u1.avatar AS sender_avatar, u2.avatar AS receiver_avatar FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN sender_anonymous_id = #{anonymousId} THEN receiver_anonymous_id ELSE sender_anonymous_id END AS other_anonymous_id, MAX(create_time) AS last_time FROM message WHERE (sender_anonymous_id = #{anonymousId} OR receiver_anonymous_id = #{anonymousId}) AND message_status = 1 GROUP BY other_anonymous_id ORDER BY last_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize} ) AS conv JOIN message m ON ( (m.sender_anonymous_id = #{anonymousId} AND m.receiver_anonymous_id = conv.other_anonymous_id) OR (m.sender_anonymous_id = conv.other_anonymous_id AND m.receiver_anonymous_id = #{anonymousId}) ) AND m.create_time = conv.last_time LEFT JOIN user u1 ON m.sender_anonymous_id = u1.anonymous_id LEFT JOIN user u2 ON m.receiver_anonymous_id = u2.anonymous_id ORDER BY m.create_time DESC
